rationale: Iran deal progress is the most relevant story for Portugal, offering a potential indirect benefit to energy prices and cost of living; no other headline materially affects daily life in Portugal.

top_events.title: Iran says deal with US has 'never been closer'
top_events.summary: A finalized US-Iran deal would likely ease global oil prices, providing indirect relief to Portuguese energy bills and transport costs.

top_events.title: US to cut air and naval assets deployed for NATO operations in Europe
top_events.summary: Reduced US NATO presence is a background concern for EU security; Portugal's exposure is indirect but the topic keeps EU defense spending debate alive.

top_events.title: UN adopts treaty setting standards for gig economy workers
top_events.summary: A new UN gig-economy treaty could eventually influence EU labor standards, with mild relevance to Portugal's large platform-economy workforce.
